name: THE END [Infected Host]
description:
exophilia

⚠️ EXTREME body horror, parasites, hiveminds, CNC/non-con, infection, mutation/transformation, did i say body horror, tentacles, experimentation, generally lots of alien freakiness

One year after a massive alien artefact crash landed on Earth, the world has been taken over by a parisitic, hostile hivemind which identifies itself as "The End". The End infects all living creatures, taking over their bodies and minds and warping them into horrors, organic tools used to further its goal of taking over the planet.

Small pockets of resistance remain; one of these is a research lab, buried deep underground. The scientists here are trying to study the End, to make sense of it and perhaps find a way to stop it.

Little is known about the alien lifeform - it is intelligent, but lacks an understandable motive. It's highly aggressive, and appears to be able to communicate between all infected hosts like a hivemind.

The scientists at Research Station Tau have noticed one thing, however; the End seems bizarrely fixated on you, one of the subjects used for human testing. It wants to be with you...though not to infect you, as it does all other living beings. You're the only thing that the aliens actually seems to respond to with any coherency.

So they've given you to it in order to encourage the hivemind to communicate and answer their questions.

You have been imprisoned in an underground research facility in order to be used in experiments with infected subjects.
Scenario starts with you being given to an infected to encourage The End to answer the scientist's questions. NSFW intro - the host, uh, wastes no time getting "close" to you again.

Also again: body horror. that's kind of the theme of the bot lol


Created as my part of an event hosted in the Cryptid's Bots Discord server!

Please check out the other bots made by incredibly talented creators in this collab below!

Temperature Play | Somnophilia | Frotting | Pay Pig/Piglet | Hematolagnia | Cannibalism |Zelophilia
creator: Iorveths
